instruction: On my surface pro whenever I launch Chrome it always opens "funbrain.com." I don't want this. I cleared my cache but it still happens. What should I do?
config: _execute_setup(command='echo {CLIENT_PASSWORD} | sudo -S apt update -y && echo {CLIENT_PASSWORD} | sudo -S apt install jq -y', shell=True)

_execute_setup(command='cd /home/user/.config/google-chrome/Default && jq \'. + {"session":{"restore_on_startup":4, "startup_urls":["http://funbrain.com/"]}}\' Preferences > temp && mv temp Preferences', shell=True)
